channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha strengthens off the Florida coast
item.description: A Gulf depression intensified into Tropical Storm Bertha on Monday, the National Hurricane Center reported.

item.title: Live: Hegseth and Caine testify before Senate panel amid Iran tensions
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Gen. Dan Caine appear before a Senate committee as tensions with Iran escalate.

item.title: Tornado warning issued in New Jersey as Northeast faces flash flood risk
item.description: The Northeast and Mid-Atlantic prepare for more severe storms and possible flash flooding on Tuesday after heavy rain.

item.title: Markets steady as Trump adds 50% tariff on some Canadian goods
item.description: President Trump plans a new 50% tariff on certain Canadian goods. CBS News' Kelly O'Grady explains the impact.
